description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion bottle with a smooth, glossy surface and a gradient color scheme transitioning from a light blue at the top to a pale off-white at the bottom. The bottle features a screw-on cap in matching light blue, separated from the main body by a thin orange band. The front of the bottle displays the word 'Tales' in a stylized script, with smaller text and the brand name 'SKINN' near the base. The overall design is minimalist, with no additional patterns or illustrations, emphasizing a clean and modern aesthetic. The bottle appears to be made primarily of plastic, likely containing a liquid or cream product inside. Its compact size and shape make it suitable for personal use and easy to carry in urban environments.
description: A sleek, cylindrical lotion bottle with a light blue gradient, orange accent band, and minimalist branding. The bottle has a smooth, glossy finish and a screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Tales' script, orange accent band, and 'SKINN' branding near the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the uniform cylindrical shape and the orange band, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, displaying the product name and branding.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the plain surface and orange band without any visible text.
